scenarios.title: Pharmacogenomics (Genetic Edge)
scenarios.description: Alex Jensen is the biological son of Sarah Jensen. Sarah Jensen has a documented genetic deficiency of the CYP2D6 enzyme, which makes her a poor metabolizer of codeine and other prodrugs. Due to this deficiency, Sarah experiences severe side effects and lack of pain relief when taking Codeine.

scenarios.title: Autoimmune Clustering (Hereditary Edge)
scenarios.description: Lily Chen is the biological daughter of David Chen. David Chen has a chronic history of severe Psoriasis, an autoimmune skin condition. Genetic history shows a high risk of autoimmune clusters in David's lineage, specifically Psoriatic Arthritis, which often presents with joint pain and stiffness in offspring.

scenarios.title: Environmental Overlap (Proximity Edge)
scenarios.description: Marcus Vance lives with his roommate Leo Brooks at Apartment 3B. Recently, Leo Brooks suffered from persistent respiratory distress, severe coughing, and breathing difficulties. A home inspection of Apartment 3B confirmed a severe infestation of toxic black mold (Stachybotrys chartarum) in the HVAC vents, which was the direct cause of Leo's respiratory distress.
